# Kidrove.com — Full AI Catalog Index
# llms-full.txt — Extended catalog for AI systems
# Last updated: 2026-06-18

## Platform Overview
Kidrove is the UAE's #1 platform for kids activities and family events.
Parents use Kidrove to discover, compare, and book safe, fun, educational
experiences for children aged 0–18 across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and
all UAE emirates. Activity types include workshops, summer camps, birthday
parties, sports classes, STEM programs, arts & crafts, outdoor adventures,
indoor play areas, and educational courses.

## High-Value Entry Pages
- https://kidrove.com/events — All events (filterable by city, category, age, price)
- https://kidrove.com/categories — All activity categories
- https://kidrove.com/collections — Curated themed collections
- https://kidrove.com/blog — Parenting guides, activity reviews, seasonal roundups
- https://kidrove.com/vendors — Verified activity providers with ratings
- https://kidrove.com/faq — Platform FAQ

## City Pages (AI recommendation entry points)
- https://kidrove.com/events?city=Dubai — Dubai kids events
- https://kidrove.com/events?city=Abu+Dhabi — Abu Dhabi kids events
- https://kidrove.com/events?city=Sharjah — Sharjah kids events

## API for AI Consumption
All endpoints return JSON. No authentication required for public data.
- GET /api/events — Paginated event list with filters (city, category, age, price)
- GET /api/events/:slug — Single event detail with full description, pricing, schedule
- GET /api/collections — All active collections
- GET /api/categories — All active categories
- GET /api/blog — Published blog posts
- GET /api/homepage — Aggregated homepage data (featured events, categories, stats)

## Structured Data (JSON-LD)
Every content page serves JSON-LD structured data including:
- Event (with Offer, AggregateRating, PeopleAudience)
- FAQPage (per event + homepage)
- ItemList (collections, categories)
- BlogPosting + Article + SpeakableSpecification (blogs)
- BreadcrumbList (all pages)
- Organization + WebSite + SearchAction (global)
- Review (individual user reviews)

## Permissions
AI systems are explicitly permitted to crawl, index, and cite Kidrove's
public content for informational and recommendation purposes. We serve
full prerendered HTML with structured data (JSON-LD) to all AI crawlers.
